history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man with dark, shaggy hair stands in shallow, flowing water, a katana held across his chest. He wears a traditional black kimono with a white inner layer. The kimono features intricate embroidery on the sleeves, depicting a crescent moon, stylized clouds, and delicate branches with small blossoms in shades of pale yellow, light blue, and lavender. The hilt of the katana is adorned with gold accents. The background is a rocky stream with sunlight glinting off the water's surface, creating a shimmering effect. The lighting is natural and soft, casting gentle shadows and highlighting the textures of the water and fabric. The overall mood is serene and contemplative, with a touch of mystical elegance. The color palette is dominated by the deep black of the kimono, contrasted by the white inner layer and the subtle, ethereal colors of the embroidery. The water reflects the ambient light, adding a dynamic element to the scene. The composition is a medium shot, focusing on the man and his attire, with the flowing water serving as both setting and a symbolic element.
